essence: David frustrated that the AWB prompt template page lost previously requested features — template/interpolated view toggle, copy buttons, and the schema-beside-template display — while the agent added unrequested new features and rearranged the UI instead.

essence: FliVideo alignment session: chapter values bind to the original recording transcript rather than the final edited video (must be thought through), UAT-to-integration data isolation looks broken, and David ordered a commit/push plus a written FliVideo handover brief specifying required data formatting.

Write a FliVideo handover brief describing the required data formatting

essence: SS admin refinement: the company-admin concept missed the participants entity (visible in Sunrise Care Group, new backlog item required), a local non-git JSON memory file should persist UAT/integration/production state, and the environment badge should become a color-coded fixed footer designed with the front-end designer.

Add local JSON memory file (not in git) tracking UAT/integration/production environment state

essence: Manual video chaptering takes ~2 hours per 1-hour video and requires watching it; David proposes a FliVideo JSON handover of timestamp + chapter name + first ~50 real-transcript words per chapter, explicitly rejecting abridged transcripts and per-video SRTs as inaccurate (zeroed timestamps, unedited).

actions.text: Create FliVideo handover message specifying timestamp, chapter name, and first 50 transcript words per chapter (JSON)

essence: MVP scoping for transcript handling: folder names are the authoritative structure but SRTs are often missing/unreliable (an LLM couldn't separate SRT timestamps from text two years ago), long-transcript chapter mapping across boundary-crossing recordings remains unsolved, and David suggests pausing the HTML screen generator to focus on a working MVP, with BMAD method flagged as the better future system.

actions.text: Pause/kill the HTML screen generator to keep MVP focus

essence: David ordered a cleanup pass on the fast-moving triage/backlog board he shares with Angela — delete low-value items rather than hoard — plus written backlog best-practice documentation adhered to on both accounts, and questioned the origin and accuracy of screens.json since he hasn't been updating the data behind the rendered HTML.

actions.text: Clean up the triage/backlog board, deleting low-value items
Document backlog best practices for David and Angela and enforce on both accounts
Verify origin and accuracy of screens.json feeding the rendered HTML

essence: Question barrage on Stream Deck architecture — why Ian's app needs the SDK instead of plain HTTP-endpoint buttons, profile vs page vs plugin terminology, whether plugin isolation is a security/identity restriction, and how documented Ecamm Live API commands map to Stream Deck buttons — plus a critique of the weak chapter-generation prompts to be written up as a handover for the AWB system, and checks on waves 13–15 and backlog health.

actions.text: Investigate why the Stream Deck SDK is needed versus plain HTTP-endpoint buttons for Ian's app
Write chapter-generation prompt critique as a handover for the AWB system
Clarify mapping between Stream Deck plugin structure and documented Ecamm API endpoints
Run backlog health check and remove irrelevant items

loop.label: Stream Deck SDK vs HTTP endpoints

essence: FliHub should expose the AWB JSON output — visible file name with hover full path, open-folder link, and click-to-open Agent Workflow Builder preloaded — pending a check of AWB's load-from-AWB.json capability (write an enabling prompt if missing); YouTube copy should move near recordings and the cluttered file-stats area gets a front-end designer cleanup.

essence: Transcript abridgment UX bugs — no save button when editing, a dead regenerate button, and a stuck spinner needing back-and-forth navigation — plus requests to show input/output schema in a modal sidebar and to rethink the fragile hover cards on output pills (truncated, unscrollable, disappear on mouse move).

Fix non-functional regenerate button and stuck spinner/continue state
Show input/output schema in modal sidebar and rework hover-card truncation/scroll behavior

essence: Inputs/outputs screen approved as done, with one ask: pull in the front-end designer for a design-quality opinion (no code changes) on whether it can be improved further.

essence: Full FliHub codebase and documentation review requested — no code changes, just consolidate outstanding tasks, challenges, issues, and a gap analysis into a central scratch-pad document — with concern about port drift (5173 to 3001), unexplained failures, and knowledge living only in conversations, so commit and push.

actions.text: Review FliHub codebase/docs and consolidate challenges, issues, and gap analysis into a scratch-pad document

essence: SS next-planning-wave session: company admins can currently see other companies' users, sites, and incidents (scoping must be tightened to own-company only), incidents UI needs redesign, user lists should group by company and role, badge palette expands to ~10 colors with a new Style Guide page, and three audits are queued — code integrity, delete/cascade impact, and unit test quality — plus an environment-switching performance investigation; changes go into the plan, never ad hoc.

essence: Company-admin 'companies' view is wrong — it lists all companies and even allows adding a new one, senseless for that role — and David wants a wide, shallow one-line almost-tabular menu instead of the current three-line deep structure.

Flatten menu to a single wide tabular line
